title: Puck's Building Additions
description: A building mod aiming to add furniture that fits in with vanilla!
body:
This mod adds vanilla-style building blocks and decorations. Additions include:
- Wooden Seats, Benches, and Stools
- Wool Seats, Ottomans, Stools, and Cushions
- Colored Flower Pots
- Hanging Flower Pots
- Large Flower Pots (Holds 2-tall plants)
- Colored Decorated Pots
- Glowing Buttons
- Paper Panels and Sliding Doors
- Cardboard block Set
- Placeable dyes, blaze powder, gunpowder, and sugar
